title: geranium cicutarium var. pilosum
intro: Geranium cicutarium var. pilosum, also known as sticky stem or hairy geranium, is a plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Geranium cicutarium var. pilosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
